auth.subtitle_login: Manage your channels and scripts in one place
auth.switch_to_signup: Don't have an account? Sign up
auth.err_user_len: Username must be at least 3 characters long.
auth.err_pass_len: Password must be at least 6 characters long.

dashboard.channels_subtitle: Select a channel to develop new ideas, organize scripts, and open the recording teleprompter.
dashboard.empty_state_text: You need to set up at least one channel to start organizing new recording scripts.
dashboard.delete_channel_warning: Deleting the channel "{{name}}" is permanent! All videos, ideas, notes, scripts, and references will be permanently deleted.

landing.hero_badge: Open Source — Free to use and contribute
landing.hero_title_1: Stop improvising the production of your
landing.hero_subtitle: CreatorsDeck is an open-source workspace that centralizes ideas, modular scripts, references, notes, and a teleprompter — everything you need before hitting REC.
landing.mockup_video_title: How to shoot videos with better pacing
landing.mockup_hook_text: Stop opening your editor without knowing what video comes next.
landing.mockup_content_text: References, script, and notes stay attached to each idea.
landing.problems_title: What content creators face every day
landing.problems_desc: Producing videos consistently is hard when your tools don't talk to each other. CreatorsDeck solves each of these problems in a single interface.
landing.solution_1: Channel idea bank with centralized status, tags, and deadlines.
landing.problem_2: Loose scripts in Google Docs, lacking structure
landing.solution_2: Modular block editor: Hook, Content, CTA, and Conclusion.
landing.solution_3: Built-in teleprompter with speed control and full-screen mode.
landing.solution_4: Production Kanban from Idea to Published.
landing.problem_5: References and thumbnails saved in loose folders
landing.solution_5: Integrated moodboard with Chrome extension capture.
landing.solution_6: 100% open source, self-hosted, and free forever.
landing.features_title: Everything you need before hitting publish
landing.feature_1_desc: Organize topics, statuses, tags, deadlines, and title alternatives without scattering everything across spreadsheets.
landing.feature_2_desc: Build hooks, development, conclusion, and CTA in an easy-to-edit and reorganize structure.
landing.feature_3_desc: Go from script straight to recording with speed, font, theme, and full-screen control.
landing.feature_4_desc: Track every video from Idea to Published with visible stages and preserved context.
landing.workflow_title: A simple process to publish frequently
landing.workflow_desc: Instead of starting from scratch every video, track the topic's evolution and keep everything in the same workspace.
landing.os_desc: CreatorsDeck is 100% open source. You can run it on your own server, adapt it to your workflow, and contribute new features. No subscriptions, no limits, no catch.
landing.os_stat_1: Star on GitHub to support the project
